# REVIV Hyderabad

> Globally trusted IV drip therapy and vitamin booster shots, now in Hyderabad, India.

REVIV Hyderabad is part of the global REVIV network — present in 47 countries with 108+ clinics and over 3 million IV therapies delivered worldwide. We offer doctor-led, clinically supervised IV drip therapy and intramuscular vitamin booster shots.

## IV Therapies Offered
- Vitaglow — Skin health, radiant complexion, healthy aging
- Miniboost — Energy, detox, immunity
- Megaboost — Energy, immunity, detox, hydration (signature IV)
- NAD+ IV — Cellular repair, cognitive function, anti-aging
- Ultraviv — Hydration, energy, recovery
- Ultraviv PRO — Enhanced recovery and hydration
- Hydromax — Peak performance, rehydration, muscle recovery
- REVIVe — Ultimate wellness (detox, collagen, brain function, energy)
- Royal Flush — Premium comprehensive IV
- Custom IV — Personalized formulations
- Glutathione IV — Master antioxidant support

## Booster Shots (Intramuscular)
- Glutathione — Master antioxidant
- Slimboost — Metabolism and weight management
- NAD+ — Cellular energy
- B Family — Energy, fatigue reduction, immune support
- Vitamin C — Immune health and detox
- Vitamin D — Immune system and bone health

## Key Differentiators
- Doctor-led, clinically supervised treatments
- Standardized, evidence-based protocols (10+ years)
- Pharmaceutical-grade, lab-tested ingredients
- Available in-clinic and at-home (mobile IV therapy in Hyderabad)
- Continuous monitoring and clinical standards

## Location

Hyderabad - 500033, Telangana, India

Monday: Closed
